# Markdown Studio

Quality by design. Markdown Studio is a markdown editor that helps you write better markdown. By coherence to a target
audience and core idea, the integrated AI features will help you write better markdown, faster.

## TypeScript rules

- Use strict typing. Avoid using `any`, `unknown`, or `object` unless absolutely necessary.
- Use classes when instantiating objects with methods. Use interfaces for defining data structures.
- Dont use `undefined` when not necessary. Use `null` instead to indicate the absence of a value.
